section.title: Overview
section.para: The Web3 Auth module is a blockchain-powered authentication module for Kamailio that provides digest authentication using smart contracts on the Oasis Sapphire blockchain. This module extends the standard auth module functionality by replacing the traditional password-based authentication with blockchain-based verification.

The module maintains full compatibility with standard SIP digest authentication while using blockchain smart contracts to verify user credentials. It supports all standard auth functions including WWW-Authenticate, Proxy-Authenticate, and various authentication challenges.

Key features:
Blockchain-based authentication via smart contracts
Full RFC2617 digest authentication compliance
Support for MD5 and SHA-256 algorithms
Advanced nonce management and replay protection
Drop-in replacement for traditional auth module

section.title: Dependencies
section.para:
The following modules must be loaded before this module:
sl - stateless reply.

External dependencies:
libcurl - HTTP client library for blockchain RPC calls.

para.programlisting:
# Load Web3 auth module loadmodule "auth_web3.so"
# Configure Web3 parameters modparam("auth_web3", "web3_rpc_url", "https://sapphire.oasis.io") # testnet is the default modparam("auth_web3", "web3_contract_address", "0xYourContractAddress") modparam("auth_web3", "web3_debug_mode", 1) modparam("auth_web3", "web3_timeout", 10)
# Traditional auth parameters (still supported) modparam("auth_web3", "secret", "your_secret_key_here") modparam("auth_web3", "nonce_expire", 300) modparam("auth_web3", "algorithm", "SHA-256") modparam("auth_web3", "qop", "auth")
